zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby於1272年1月31日出生在英國斯塔福爾薩爾時，他的父親William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland33歲，母親Lady Anne Durward31歲。他於1297年與Margaret Segrave在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年3月20日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年53歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby于1272年1月31日出生在英国斯塔福爾薩爾时，他的父亲William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland33岁，母亲Lady Anne Durward31岁。他于1297年与Margaret Segrave在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年3月20日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年53岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby was born on 31 January 1272, in Yoxall, Staffordshire, England, his father, William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland, was 33 and his mother, Lady Anne Durward, was 31. He married Margaret Segrave in 1297, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 March 1325, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Groby, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby est né le 31 janvier 1272, à Yoxall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Durward, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Segrave en 1297, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1325, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby am 31. Januar 1272 in Yoxall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland 33 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Durward 31. Er hat 1297 in Groby, Leicestershire, England Margaret Segrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. März 1325 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Groby, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby è nato il il 31 gennaio 1272 nel Yoxall, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne Durward, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Segrave nel 1297, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1325, nel Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Groby, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Grobyが1272年1月31日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアイオクサルで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers Constable of Scotlandは33歳，母Lady Anne Durwardは31歳であった。1297年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでMargaret Segraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年3月20日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで53歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby(이)가 1272년 1월 31일 영국 스태퍼드실르 요스알에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Durward(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1297년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Margaret Segrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 3월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에 묻혔다.

pt.31 January 1272–20 March 1325: 31 de janeiro de 1272–20 de março de 1325
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby nasceu em 31 de janeiro de 1272, em Yoxall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Durward, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Segrave em 1297, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1325, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby родился 31 января 1272 г. в местности ексалл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Durward, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Segrave в 1297 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 марта 1325 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.31 January 1272–20 March 1325: 31 de enero de 1272–20 de marzo de 1325
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby nació el 31 de enero de 1272, en Yoxall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Durward, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret Segrave en 1297, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1325, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
